BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Rough model ahead of Voices of the Past opening. Pre-board review.

CurrentState.Note: Pre-opening estimate. Revisit after Nov once opening-week bump normalizes.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent hold at current rate scenario
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $8,640 at $45/member equals 192 members minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Comfortable. Current 210 members clears the line.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Rent bump to $4,200 scenario
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still workable at 210 members but reduces cushion.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~192 members at current cost structure. Comfortable at 210, tight at 200.
ActionItems: Model rent bump if landlord follow-up moves this quarter
